title: Welcome
description: Thank you for downloading Ozmoz, I hope you enjoy it!

title: Performance & Stability (v1.0.2)
description: This release brings performance gains: FFmpeg has been removed to shave over 100MB off the app size, and MP3 conversion is bypassed to decrease latency. We also solved visualizer disappearances and added instant clipboard pasting.

title: New mode ! (v1.0.1)
description: Now you can turn your voice into LaTeX equations with the new Equation mode. This mode is only available when using a Groq API key because it requires cloud-based LLMs. By default, it uses the cheapest and fastest model currently available on the Groq Cloud.

title: Ozmoz Beta
description: A portable beta version of Ozmoz including near-instant audio transcription features, vocabulary addition, and configuration modes.
